sEn: Conditional GANs enable controlled data generation by conditioning on additional information like class labels.
sZh: 条件GAN通过附加信息（如类别标签）实现可控数据生成。
absEn: Generative Adversarial Nets [8] were recently introduced as a novel way to train generative models. In this work we introduce the conditional version of generative adversarial nets, which can be constructed by simply feeding the data, y, we wish to condition on to both the generator and discriminator. We show that this model can generate MNIST digits conditioned on class labels. We also illustrate how this model could be used to learn a multi-modal model, and provide preliminary examples of an application to image tagging in which we demonstrate how this approach can generate descriptive tags which are not part of training labels.
absZh: 生成对抗网络[8]最近被引入作为一种训练生成模型的新方法。在这项工作中，我们引入了条件版本的生成对抗网络，它可以通过简单地将我们希望条件化的数据y输入到生成器和判别器中来构建。我们展示了该模型可以生成以类别标签为条件的MNIST数字。我们还说明了该模型如何用于学习多模态模型，并提供了图像标注应用的初步示例，其中我们展示了该方法如何生成不属于训练标签的描述性标签。

contrib.en: Introduces conditional generative adversarial nets (cGANs) by feeding conditioning data to both generator and discriminator.
contrib.zh: 提出条件生成对抗网络（cGAN），将条件数据同时输入生成器和判别器。

contrib.en: Demonstrates MNIST digit generation conditioned on class labels.
contrib.zh: 展示基于类别标签的MNIST数字生成。

contrib.en: Shows multi-modal learning capability via image tagging on MIR Flickr dataset.
contrib.zh: 在MIR Flickr数据集上展示图像标注的多模态学习能力。

contrib.en: Generates descriptive tags not present in training labels using word embeddings.
contrib.zh: 利用词嵌入生成训练标签中未出现的描述性标签。

contrib.en: Provides a framework for one-to-many mapping in probabilistic generative models.
contrib.zh: 为概率生成模型中的一对多映射提供框架。

limits.en: Preliminary results; conditional model underperforms non-conditional adversarial nets on MNIST.
limits.zh: 初步结果：条件模型在MNIST上表现不如非条件对抗网络。

limits.en: Image tagging experiments use fixed convolutional and language models without joint training.
limits.zh: 图像标注实验使用固定的卷积和语言模型，未进行联合训练。

limits.en: Only single tags used per image; multi-tag set generation left for future work.
limits.zh: 每张图像仅使用单个标签，多标签集合生成留待未来工作。

limits.en: Hyper-parameter search limited; architecture not fully optimized.
limits.zh: 超参数搜索有限，架构未完全优化。

items.en: Generative Adversarial Nets [8] were recently introduced as a novel way to train generative models. In this work we introduce the conditional version of generative adversarial nets, which can be constructed by simply feeding the data, y𝑦{y}, we wish to condition on to both the generator and discriminator. We show that this model can generate MNIST digits conditioned on class labels. We also illustrate how this model could be used to learn a multi-modal model, and provide preliminary examples of an application to image tagging in which we demonstrate how this approach can generate descriptive tags which are not part of training labels.
items.zh: 生成对抗网络[8]最近被引入作为一种训练生成模型的新方法。在这项工作中，我们引入了条件生成对抗网络，它可以通过简单地将我们希望条件化的数据y输入到生成器和判别器中来构建。我们展示了该模型可以根据类别标签生成MNIST数字。我们还说明了该模型如何用于学习多模态模型，并提供了图像标注应用的初步示例，展示了该方法如何生成不属于训练标签的描述性标签。

items.en: Generative adversarial nets were recently introduced as an alternative framework for training generative models in order to sidestep the difficulty of approximating many intractable probabilistic computations.
items.zh: 生成对抗网络最近被引入作为训练生成模型的替代框架，以规避近似许多难处理的概率计算的困难。

items.en: Adversarial nets have the advantages that Markov chains are never needed, only backpropagation is used to obtain gradients, no inference is required during learning, and a wide variety of factors and interactions can easily be incorporated into the model.
items.zh: 对抗网络具有以下优点：不需要马尔可夫链，仅使用反向传播获取梯度，学习过程中不需要推理，并且可以轻松地将各种因素和交互纳入模型。

items.en: Furthermore, as demonstrated in [8], it can produce state of the art log-likelihood estimates and realistic samples.
items.zh: 此外，如[8]所示，它可以产生最先进的对数似然估计和逼真的样本。

items.en: In an unconditioned generative model, there is no control on modes of the data being generated. However, by conditioning the model on additional information it is possible to direct the data generation process. Such conditioning could be based on class labels, on some part of data for inpainting like [5], or even on data from different modality.
items.zh: 在无条件生成模型中，无法控制生成数据的模式。然而，通过将模型条件化于额外信息，可以指导数据生成过程。这种条件化可以基于类别标签、用于修复的部分数据（如[5]），甚至来自不同模态的数据。

items.en: In this work we show how can we construct the conditional adversarial net. And for empirical results we demonstrate two set of experiment. One on MNIST digit data set conditioned on class labels and one on MIR Flickr 25,000 dataset [10] for multi-modal learning.
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们展示了如何构建条件对抗网络。对于实证结果，我们展示了两个实验：一个是在MNIST数字数据集上以类别标签为条件，另一个是在MIR Flickr 25,000数据集[10]上进行多模态学习。

full.secZh: 2.1 图像标注的多模态学习

items.en: Despite the many recent successes of supervised neural networks (and convolutional networks in particular) [13, 17], it remains challenging to scale such models to accommodate an extremely large number of predicted output categories. A second issue is that much of the work to date has focused on learning one-to-one mappings from input to output. However, many interesting problems are more naturally thought of as a probabilistic one-to-many mapping. For instance in the case of image labeling there may be many different tags that could appropriately applied to a given image, and different (human) annotators may use different (but typically synonymous or related) terms to describe the same image.
items.zh: 尽管监督神经网络（特别是卷积网络）最近取得了许多成功[13, 17]，但将这些模型扩展到容纳极大量预测输出类别仍然具有挑战性。第二个问题是，迄今为止的大部分工作都集中在学习从输入到输出的一对一映射。然而，许多有趣的问题更自然地被视为概率性的一对多映射。例如，在图像标注的情况下，可能有许多不同的标签可以适当地应用于给定图像，并且不同的（人类）标注者可能使用不同的（但通常是同义或相关的）术语来描述同一图像。

items.en: One way to help address the first issue is to leverage additional information from other modalities: for instance, by using natural language corpora to learn a vector representation for labels in which geometric relations are semantically meaningful. When making predictions in such spaces, we benefit from the fact that when prediction errors we are still often ‘close’ to the truth (e.g. predicting ’table’ instead of ’chair’), and also from the fact that we can naturally make predictive generalizations to labels that were not seen during training time. Works such as [3] have shown that even a simple linear mapping from image feature-space to word-representation-space can yield improved classification performance.
items.zh: 帮助解决第一个问题的一种方法是利用来自其他模态的额外信息：例如，使用自然语言语料库学习标签的向量表示，其中几何关系具有语义意义。在这样的空间中进行预测时，我们受益于这样一个事实：即使预测错误，我们通常仍然“接近”真相（例如，预测“桌子”而不是“椅子”），并且我们自然可以对训练期间未见过的标签进行预测泛化。诸如[3]的工作表明，即使是从图像特征空间到词表示空间的简单线性映射也能提高分类性能。

items.en: One way to address the second problem is to use a conditional probabilistic generative model, the input is taken to be the conditioning variable and the one-to-many mapping is instantiated as a conditional predictive distribution.
items.zh: 解决第二个问题的一种方法是使用条件概率生成模型，将输入视为条件变量，并将一对多映射实例化为条件预测分布。

items.en: [16] take a similar approach to this problem, and train a multi-modal Deep Boltzmann Machine on the MIR Flickr 25,000 dataset as we do in this work.
items.zh: [16]采用了类似的方法，并在MIR Flickr 25,000数据集上训练了一个多模态深度玻尔兹曼机，正如我们在本工作中所做的那样。

items.en: Additionally, in [12] the authors show how to train a supervised multi-modal neural language model, and they are able to generate descriptive sentence for images.
items.zh: 此外，在[12]中，作者展示了如何训练一个监督的多模态神经语言模型，并且他们能够为图像生成描述性句子。

items.en: Generative adversarial nets were recently introduced as a novel way to train a generative model. They consists of two ‘adversarial’ models: a generative model G𝐺{G} that captures the data distribution, and a discriminative model D𝐷{D} that estimates the probability that a sample came from the training data rather than G𝐺{G}. Both G𝐺{G} and D𝐷{D} could be a non-linear mapping function, such as a multi-layer perceptron.
items.zh: 生成对抗网络最近被引入作为一种训练生成模型的新方法。它们由两个“对抗”模型组成：一个生成模型G，它捕获数据分布；以及一个判别模型D，它估计样本来自训练数据而非G的概率。G和D都可以是非线性映射函数，例如多层感知器。

items.en: To learn a generator distribution pgsubscript𝑝𝑔{p_{g}} over data data 𝒙𝒙{\bm{x}}, the generator builds a mapping function from a prior noise distribution pz​(z)subscript𝑝𝑧𝑧{p_{z}(z)} to data space as G​(z;θg)𝐺𝑧subscript𝜃𝑔{G(z;\theta_{g})}. And the discriminator, D​(x;θd)𝐷𝑥subscript𝜃𝑑{D(x;\theta_{d})}, outputs a single scalar representing the probability that 𝒙𝒙{\bm{x}} came form training data rather than pgsubscript𝑝𝑔{p_{g}}.
items.zh: 为了学习数据x上的生成器分布pg，生成器构建了一个从先验噪声分布pz(z)到数据空间的映射函数G(z;θg)。判别器D(x;θd)输出一个标量，表示x来自训练数据而非pg的概率。

items.en: G𝐺{G} and D𝐷{D} are both trained simultaneously: we adjust parameters for G𝐺{G} to minimize log(1−D(G(𝒛)){log(1-D(G(\bm{z}))} and adjust parameters for D𝐷D to minimize l​o​g​D​(X)𝑙𝑜𝑔𝐷𝑋{logD(X)}, as if they are following the two-player min-max game with value function V​(G,D)𝑉𝐺𝐷{V(G,D)}:
items.zh: G和D同时训练：我们调整G的参数以最小化log(1-D(G(z)))，并调整D的参数以最小化logD(X)，就像它们遵循具有价值函数V(G,D)的双人极小极大博弈一样：

items.en: Generative adversarial nets can be extended to a conditional model if both the generator and discriminator are conditioned on some extra information 𝒚𝒚{\bm{y}}. 𝒚𝒚{\bm{y}} could be any kind of auxiliary information, such as class labels or data from other modalities. We can perform the conditioning by feeding 𝒚𝒚{\bm{y}} into the both the discriminator and generator as additional input layer.
items.zh: 如果生成器和判别器都条件化于一些额外信息y，则生成对抗网络可以扩展到条件模型。y可以是任何类型的辅助信息，例如类别标签或其他模态的数据。我们可以通过将y作为额外的输入层馈送到判别器和生成器中来执行条件化。

items.en: In the generator the prior input noise p𝒛​(𝒛)subscript𝑝𝒛𝒛p_{\bm{z}}(\bm{z}), and 𝒚𝒚{\bm{y}} are combined in joint hidden representation, and the adversarial training framework allows for considerable flexibility in how this hidden representation is composed. 111For now we simply have the conditioning input and prior noise as inputs to a single hidden layer of a MLP, but one could imagine using higher order interactions allowing for complex generation mechanisms that would be extremely difficult to work with in a traditional generative framework.
items.zh: 在生成器中，先验输入噪声pz(z)和y在联合隐藏表示中组合，对抗训练框架允许在如何组合这个隐藏表示方面具有相当大的灵活性。1目前我们只是将条件输入和先验噪声作为MLP单个隐藏层的输入，但可以想象使用更高阶的交互，从而实现传统生成框架中极难处理的复杂生成机制。

items.en: In the discriminator 𝒙𝒙{\bm{x}} and 𝒚𝒚{\bm{y}} are presented as inputs and to a discriminative function (embodied again by a MLP in this case).
items.zh: 在判别器中，x和y作为输入呈现给判别函数（本例中同样由MLP体现）。

items.en: The objective function of a two-player minimax game would be as Eq 2
items.zh: 双人极小极大博弈的目标函数如公式2所示。

items.en: Fig 1 illustrates the structure of a simple conditional adversarial net.
items.zh: 图1展示了一个简单的条件对抗网络的结构。

items.en: We trained a conditional adversarial net on MNIST images conditioned on their class labels, encoded as one-hot vectors.
items.zh: 我们在MNIST图像上训练了一个条件对抗网络，以类别标签（编码为独热向量）为条件。

items.en: In the generator net, a noise prior 𝒛𝒛{\bm{z}} with dimensionality 100 was drawn from a uniform distribution within the unit hypercube. Both 𝒛𝒛{\bm{z}} and 𝒚𝒚{\bm{y}} are mapped to hidden layers with Rectified Linear Unit (ReLu) activation [4, 11], with layer sizes 200 and 1000 respectively, before both being mapped to second, combined hidden ReLu layer of dimensionality 1200. We then have a final sigmoid unit layer as our output for generating the 784-dimensional MNIST samples.
items.zh: 在生成器网络中，从单位超立方体内的均匀分布中抽取维度为100的噪声先验𝒛。𝒛和𝒚分别映射到具有修正线性单元（ReLu）激活的隐藏层[4, 11]，层大小分别为200和1000，然后两者映射到第二个组合隐藏ReLu层，维度为1200。最后，我们有一个最终的sigmoid单元层作为输出，用于生成784维的MNIST样本。

items.en: The discriminator maps 𝒙𝒙{\bm{x}} to a maxout [6] layer with 240 units and 5 pieces, and 𝒚𝒚{\bm{y}} to a maxout layer with 50 units and 5 pieces. Both of the hidden layers mapped to a joint maxout layer with 240 units and 4 pieces before being fed to the sigmoid layer. (The precise architecture of the discriminator is not critical as long as it has sufficient power; we have found that maxout units are typically well suited to the task.)
items.zh: 判别器将𝒙映射到具有240个单元和5个分片的maxout层[6]，并将𝒚映射到具有50个单元和5个分片的maxout层。两个隐藏层都映射到一个具有240个单元和4个分片的联合maxout层，然后馈送到sigmoid层。（判别器的精确架构并不关键，只要它有足够的能力；我们发现maxout单元通常非常适合此任务。）

items.en: The model was trained using stochastic gradient decent with mini-batches of size 100 and initial learning rate of 0.10.10.1 which was exponentially decreased down to .000001.000001.000001 with decay factor of 1.000041.000041.00004. Also momentum was used with initial value of .5.5.5 which was increased up to 0.70.70.7. Dropout [9] with probability of 0.5 was applied to both the generator and discriminator. And best estimate of log-likelihood on the validation set was used as stopping point.
items.zh: 模型使用随机梯度下降进行训练，小批量大小为100，初始学习率为0.1，以1.00004的衰减因子指数衰减至0.000001。还使用了动量，初始值为0.5，增加到0.7。在生成器和判别器中均应用了概率为0.5的Dropout[9]。以验证集上对数似然的最佳估计作为停止点。

items.en: The conditional adversarial net results that we present are comparable with some other network based, but are outperformed by several other approaches – including non-conditional adversarial nets. We present these results more as a proof-of-concept than as demonstration of efficacy, and believe that with further exploration of hyper-parameter space and architecture that the conditional model should match or exceed the non-conditional results.
items.zh: 我们提出的条件对抗网络结果与其他基于网络的方法相当，但被几种其他方法（包括非条件对抗网络）超越。我们展示这些结果更多是作为概念验证而非有效性证明，并相信通过进一步探索超参数空间和架构，条件模型应该能达到或超过非条件结果。

items.en: Fig 2 shows some of the generated samples. Each row is conditioned on one label and each column is a different generated sample.
items.zh: 图2展示了一些生成的样本。每一行以一个标签为条件，每一列是一个不同的生成样本。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Generated MNIST digits, each row conditioned on one label
items.capZh: 图2：生成的MNIST数字，每行以一个标签为条件

items.en: Photo sites such as Flickr are a rich source of labeled data in the form of images and their associated user-generated metadata (UGM) — in particular user-tags.
items.zh: 像Flickr这样的照片网站是丰富的标记数据来源，形式为图像及其相关的用户生成元数据（UGM）——特别是用户标签。

items.en: User-generated metadata differ from more ‘canonical’ image labelling schems in that they are typically more descriptive, and are semantically much closer to how humans describe images with natural language rather than just identifying the objects present in an image. Another aspect of UGM is that synoymy is prevalent and different users may use different vocabulary to describe the same concepts — consequently, having an efficient way to normalize these labels becomes important. Conceptual word embeddings [14] can be very useful here since related concepts end up being represented by similar vectors.
items.zh: 用户生成元数据与更“规范”的图像标记方案不同，因为它们通常更具描述性，并且在语义上更接近人类用自然语言描述图像的方式，而不仅仅是识别图像中存在的对象。UGM的另一个方面是同义词普遍存在，不同的用户可能使用不同的词汇来描述相同的概念——因此，拥有一种有效的方法来规范化这些标签变得重要。概念词嵌入[14]在这里非常有用，因为相关的概念最终由相似的向量表示。

items.en: In this section we demonstrate automated tagging of images, with multi-label predictions, using conditional adversarial nets to generate a (possibly multi-modal) distribution of tag-vectors conditional on image features.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们演示了使用条件对抗网络对图像进行自动标记，生成多标签预测，即生成以图像特征为条件的标签向量（可能为多模态）分布。

items.en: For image features we pre-train a convolutional model similar to the one from [13] on the full ImageNet dataset with 21,000 labels [15]. We use the output of the last fully connected layer with 4096 units as image representations.
items.zh: 对于图像特征，我们预训练了一个类似于[13]的卷积模型，在完整的ImageNet数据集（21,000个标签）[15]上训练。我们使用最后一个全连接层（4096个单元）的输出作为图像表示。

items.en: For the world representation we first gather a corpus of text from concatenation of user-tags, titles and descriptions from YFCC100M 222Yahoo Flickr Creative Common 100M http://webscope.sandbox.yahoo.com/catalog.php?datatype=i&did=67. dataset metadata. After pre-processing and cleaning of the text we trained a skip-gram model [14] with word vector size of 200. And we omitted any word appearing less than 200 times from the vocabulary, thereby ending up with a dictionary of size 247465.
items.zh: 对于世界表示，我们首先从YFCC100M数据集元数据中收集文本语料库，该语料库由用户标签、标题和描述的拼接而成。经过文本预处理和清洗后，我们训练了一个skip-gram模型[14]，词向量大小为200。我们从词汇表中省略了出现次数少于200次的任何单词，最终得到大小为247465的字典。

items.en: We keep the convolutional model and the language model fixed during training of the adversarial net. And leave the experiments when we even backpropagate through these models as future work.
items.zh: 在对抗网络训练期间，我们保持卷积模型和语言模型固定。将反向传播通过这些模型的实验留作未来工作。

items.en: For our experiments we use MIR Flickr 25,000 dataset [10], and extract the image and tags features using the convolutional model and language model we described above. Images without any tag were omitted from our experiments and annotations were treated as extra tags. The first 150,000 examples were used as training set. Images with multiple tags were repeated inside the training set once for each associated tag.
items.zh: 在我们的实验中，我们使用MIR Flickr 25,000数据集[10]，并使用上述卷积模型和语言模型提取图像和标签特征。没有标签的图像被排除在实验之外，注释被视为额外标签。前150,000个示例用作训练集。具有多个标签的图像在训练集中为每个关联标签重复一次。

items.en: For evaluation, we generate 100 samples for each image and find top 20 closest words using cosine similarity of vector representation of the words in the vocabulary to each sample. Then we select the top 10 most common words among all 100 samples. Table 2 shows some samples of the user assigned tags and annotations along with the generated tags.
items.zh: 为了评估，我们为每张图像生成100个样本，并使用词汇表中词向量的余弦相似度找到每个样本的前20个最接近的词。然后，我们从所有100个样本中选择前10个最常见的词。表2显示了一些用户分配标签和注释以及生成标签的样本。

items.en: The best working model’s generator receives Gaussian noise of size 100 as noise prior and maps it to 500 dimension ReLu layer. And maps 4096 dimension image feature vector to 2000 dimension ReLu hidden layer. Both of these layers are mapped to a joint representation of 200 dimension linear layer which would output the generated word vectors.
items.zh: 最佳工作模型的生成器接收大小为100的高斯噪声作为噪声先验，并将其映射到500维的ReLu层。并将4096维的图像特征向量映射到2000维的ReLu隐藏层。这两个层都映射到一个200维线性层的联合表示，该层输出生成的词向量。

items.en: The discriminator is consisted of 500 and 1200 dimension ReLu hidden layers for word vectors and image features respectively and maxout layer with 1000 units and 3 pieces as the join layer which is finally fed to the one single sigmoid unit.
items.zh: 判别器由词向量的500维ReLu隐藏层和图像特征的1200维ReLu隐藏层组成，以及一个具有1000个单元和3个分片的maxout层作为联合层，最后馈送到单个sigmoid单元。

items.en: The model was trained using stochastic gradient decent with mini-batches of size 100 and initial learning rate of 0.10.10.1 which was exponentially decreased down to .000001.000001.000001 with decay factor of 1.000041.000041.00004. Also momentum was used with initial value of .5.5.5 which was increased up to 0.70.70.7. Dropout with probability of 0.5 was applied to both the generator and discriminator.
items.zh: 模型使用随机梯度下降进行训练，小批量大小为100，初始学习率为0.1，以1.00004的衰减因子指数衰减至0.000001。还使用了动量，初始值为0.5，增加到0.7。在生成器和判别器中均应用了概率为0.5的Dropout。

items.en: The hyper-parameters and architectural choices were obtained by cross-validation and a mix of random grid search and manual selection (albeit over a somewhat limited search space.)
items.zh: 超参数和架构选择通过交叉验证以及随机网格搜索和手动选择的混合方式获得（尽管搜索空间有些有限）。

items.en: The results shown in this paper are extremely preliminary, but they demonstrate the potential of conditional adversarial nets and show promise for interesting and useful applications.
items.zh: 本文展示的结果非常初步，但它们展示了条件对抗网络的潜力，并显示出有趣和有用应用的前景。

items.en: In future explorations between now and the workshop we expect to present more sophisticated models, as well as a more detailed and thorough analysis of their performance and characteristics.
items.zh: 在本次研讨会之前和期间的未来探索中，我们预计将展示更复杂的模型，以及对其性能和特征进行更详细、更彻底的分析。

items.en: Also, in the current experiments we only use each tag individually. But by using multiple tags at the same time (effectively posing generative problem as one of ‘set generation’) we hope to achieve better results.
items.zh: 此外，在当前实验中，我们仅单独使用每个标签。但通过同时使用多个标签（实际上将生成问题视为“集合生成”问题），我们希望获得更好的结果。

items.en: Another obvious direction left for future work is to construct a joint training scheme to learn the language model. Works such as [12] has shown that we can learn a language model for suited for the specific task.
items.zh: 另一个留给未来工作的明显方向是构建一个联合训练方案来学习语言模型。诸如[12]等研究表明，我们可以学习一个适合特定任务的语言模型。

items.en: This project was developed in Pylearn2 [7] framework, and we would like to thank Pylearn2 developers. We also like to thank Ian Goodfellow for helpful discussion during his affiliation at University of Montreal. The authors gratefully acknowledge the support from the Vision & Machine Learning, and Production Engineering teams at Flickr (in alphabetical order: Andrew Stadlen, Arel Cordero, Clayton Mellina, Cyprien Noel, Frank Liu, Gerry Pesavento, Huy Nguyen, Jack Culpepper, John Ko, Pierre Garrigues, Rob Hess, Stacey Svetlichnaya, Tobi Baumgartner, and Ye Lu).
items.zh: 本项目是在Pylearn2 [7]框架下开发的，我们感谢Pylearn2的开发人员。我们也感谢Ian Goodfellow在蒙特利尔大学期间进行的有益讨论。作者衷心感谢Flickr的视觉与机器学习团队以及生产工程团队的支持（按字母顺序排列：Andrew Stadlen、Arel Cordero、Clayton Mellina、Cyprien Noel、Frank Liu、Gerry Pesavento、Huy Nguyen、Jack Culpepper、John Ko、Pierre Garrigues、Rob Hess、Stacey Svetlichnaya、Tobi Baumgartner和Ye Lu）。
